data.body: Fifth review BLOCK remediation: accepted f662c2f6cb49a1346 by removing config parsing/toggling from this story; acaf now proves unconditional emission through a configuration-free collection path, while 75de owns the actual verify.enforce_plan_material_pins schema and true/false integration ACs. Accepted advisories by specifying repo_root=None -> config.tracker_dir(None), naming deleted-target refresh/re-sign tests, and documenting that rollback may produce valid legacy-unpinned attestations after enforcement is disabled; pins are reconstructible on the next forward review. Rerunning before downstream review.
